title: Our Children, Lord, in Faith and Prayer

verses.text: Our children, Lord, in faith and prayer, we now devote to thee; let them thy cov'nant mercies share and thy salvation see.
Such helpless babes thou didst embrace while dwelling here below; to us and ours, O God of grace, the same compassion show.
In early days their hearts secure from worldly snares, we pray; O let them to the end endure in ev'ry righteous way.
